Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants Uber Technologies, Inc., Raiser-CA, LLC and Raiser, LLC's motion to compel arbitration and to stay this case is granted.

No opposition filed and good cause shown. This case is stayed until the conclusion of the arbitration proceedings between moving defendants and plaintiff.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)
